nodes.name: Grey-crowned yellowthroat
nodes.summary: The grey-crowned yellowthroat (Geothlypis poliocephala) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is found in Belize, Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, and the United States. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist shrubland and heavily degraded former forest. References External links Media related to Geothlypis poliocephala at Wikimedia Commons
